summary: Executed backend pytest API regression and frontend Playwright E2E for Cat House public URL. Core homepage sections, sticky nav anchors, CTA buttons, WhatsApp link, contact form integration, and mobile menu are working.
action_items: No blocking fixes required from this test cycle.
critical_code_review_comments: No critical code-level issues found in reviewed files for requested scope.
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_ prefixed status/contact entries via public APIs during validation.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend regression file now exists at /app/backend/tests/test_public_api.py and can be reused. Public API and UI flows passed on https://paws-premium-pets.preview.emergentagent.com.
rca of the issue: No functional bug reproduced. Initial mobile menu visibility timeout was test-flow related (viewport switched while page remained scrolled to contact section), not an app defect; verified menu opens and links work after resetting scroll to top.
